name: crop-recommendation-system-root
description: Root orchestrator for Crop Recommendation System

scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:recommend" "npm run start:carbon"
scripts.start:venv: concurrently --kill-others "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:recommend:venv" "npm run start:carbon:venv"
